caption: A man with glasses and a mustache, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a dark grey blazer, presents a lecture on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING." In the first frame, he is positioned to the right of a text slide titled "Heat Exchanger," which states, "In order to specify the performance of the heat exchanger in terms of actual heat exchange occurring, a term "$\epsilon$" is defined which is called as Heat Exchanger Effectiveness." The bottom of the frame includes the text "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay" and an "NPTEL" logo. In the subsequent frames, the text slide disappears, and the camera zooms in to a medium close-up of the man. He remains centered against a stylized blue and purple background with abstract shapes. Throughout the sequence, he maintains a neutral expression while speaking, with minimal movement in his posture.
